statement: Offline scope — MVP is not a full offline sync app. Offline support is limited — Affects scope of local cache, no background sync
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User gets basic protection, not full offline collaboration.
